title: AXLengthValidationRule
description: Validation rule class that validates the length of string values.

types.title: AXLengthValidationRule

props.name: options
props.description: Configuration options for the length validation rule.

types.description: Validation rule that checks if a string value has a specific length or falls within a length range.

methods.name: validate
methods.description: Validates that the string length matches the specified criteria.

methods.name: validateAsync
methods.description: Asynchronously validates that the string length matches the specified criteria.

methods.name: setMinLength
methods.description: Sets the minimum allowed length for validation.

methods.name: setMaxLength
methods.description: Sets the maximum allowed length for validation.

methods.name: setExactLength
methods.description: Sets the exact required length for validation.
